title: Spicy Norwegian Fish Pasta
description: A flavorful and spicy pasta dish featuring Norwegian fish, mildly seasoned with herbs and spices.
instructions: Cook the penne pasta according to the package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the Norwegian fish fillets and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, until cooked through.
Add the red pepper flakes and cook for an additional minute.
Stir in the cooked penne pasta and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the pasta to a serving dish and garnish with chopped parsley.
